source_jobs.title: Founding Account Executive | SMB
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT DUSK

Dusk delivers the capabilities of a world-class entertainment director, at a fraction of the cost. Made for modern venue operators to save time, improve operations, and boost revenue. Trusted by 500+ bars, nightclubs, restaurants, and hotels – powering 50K+ concerts annually. We've raised over $5M from strategic investors, including founders and executives from Carta, Vercel, and Yelp as well as Atlantic Records, Red Light Management, and Independent Artists Group (IAG). Our team includes YC-backed founders and individuals from Goldman Sachs, BlackRock, and Apollo.io.




ABOUT THE ROLE

Dusk is hiring a Founding Account Executive (SMB) to own revenue growth in our core hospitality segment (bars, nightclubs, restaurants, hotels). This is a high-velocity, full-cycle sales role responsible for owning the end-to-end revenue process from prospecting to close. As one of the first AEs on the team, you’ll be instrumental in shaping our go-to-market motion, influencing product feedback loops, and driving meaningful revenue growth. You’ll work directly with founders and cross-functional teams to bring the infrastructure powering the future of live entertainment to life.




KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Own the full sales cycle: outreach, discovery, demo, and close

 - Prospect daily to create pipeline via high-quality outbound (calls, emails, social)

 - Run discovery with venue operators to map pain to ROI (save time, improve operations, boost revenue) and close with urgency

 - Maintain and manage an accurate sales pipeline in our CRM

 - Partner with customer success and onboarding teams to ensure smooth handoffs and long-term success

 - Capture customer insights to inform product roadmap and marketing messaging

 - Hit and exceed monthly revenue targets
   


QUALIFICATIONS

 - 2-4+ years of full-cycle sales experience in B2B SaaS (hospitality tech is a plus)

 - Proven track record of hitting/exceeding sales targets

 - Strong outbound skills (you can create pipeline, not just work inbound)

 - Excellent communication and storytelling skills, you're comfortable leading product demos and value-based conversations

 - Highly organized, self-motivated, and hungry to win

 - Experience selling to SMB; familiarity with < 30-day transactional sales cycles

 - Passion for live entertainment, hospitality, and empowering small business owners

 - Bonus: familiarity with Salesforce




PERKS & BENEFITS

 - Competitive base salary + uncapped commission

 - Equity options

 - Comprehensive health, dental, and vision benefits

 - Early-stage ownership and ability to help shape the go-to-market playbook

 - Work directly with founders in a fast-paced, high-growth startup environment

 - Access to live events and industry networking opportunities




COMPENSATION

 - Base Salary: $90,000

 - On-Target Earnings (OTE): $150,000 - $200,000



If you're a natural closer with a passion for live entertainment and helping venues thrive, we’d love to hear from you.

source_jobs.title: Staff Product Designer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT DUSK

Dusk delivers the capabilities of a world-class entertainment director, at a fraction of the cost. Made for modern venue operators to save time, improve operations, and boost revenue. Trusted by 500+ bars, nightclubs, restaurants, and hotels – powering 50K+ concerts annually. We've raised over $5M from strategic investors, including founders and executives from Carta, Vercel, and Yelp as well as Atlantic Records, Red Light Management, and Independent Artists Group (IAG). Our team includes YC-backed founders and individuals from Goldman Sachs, BlackRock, and Apollo.io.




ABOUT THE ROLE

We’re seeking a Staff Product Designer to shape the creative and functional DNA of Dusk’s platform. As one of the first design leaders, you’ll define how the product looks, feels, and behaves — turning complex workflows into intuitive, visually elegant experiences. You’ll collaborate with founders, engineers, and customers to bring Dusk’s mission to life through design systems, prototypes, and production-ready interfaces.




KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Lead design for core product surfaces

 - Define and evolve Dusk’s design language and component system

 - Conduct user research and translate insights into product direction

 - Build high-fidelity prototypes that communicate vision and drive alignment

 - Collaborate with engineers to ensure design quality from concept to release

 - Mentor other designers and help scale design culture across the company

 - Balance creativity with pragmatism - shipping high-impact, user-centered work




QUALIFICATIONS

 - 6+ years of product design experience, ideally in SaaS or creative tooling

 - Portfolio showcasing excellent interaction and visual design work

 - Fluency in Figma and modern prototyping tools

 - Strong grasp of UX principles, hierarchy, and system thinking

 - Proven track record leading 0→1 or platform-level design initiatives

 - Excellent communication skills and comfort presenting to stakeholders

 - Bonus: experience designing for creative pros, music, or entertainment products




PERKS & BENEFITS

 - Competitive salary + equity options

 - Comprehensive health, dental, and vision benefits

 - Early technical ownership in a high-growth, mission-driven company

 - Access to live events and industry networking opportunities

source_jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer | Backend
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT DUSK

Dusk delivers the capabilities of a world-class entertainment director, at a fraction of the cost. Made for modern venue operators to save time, improve operations, and boost revenue. Trusted by 500+ bars, nightclubs, restaurants, and hotels – powering 50K+ concerts annually. We've raised over $5M from strategic investors, including founders and executives from Carta, Vercel, and Yelp as well as Atlantic Records, Red Light Management, and Independent Artists Group (IAG). Our team includes YC-backed founders and individuals from Goldman Sachs, BlackRock, and Apollo.io.




ABOUT THE ROLE

We’re seeking a Senior Backend Engineer to help build the core infrastructure that powers Dusk’s event management platform. You’ll work closely with product, design, and data teams to architect reliable, scalable services that deliver real-time insights, automation, and integrations for venues worldwide. This role is ideal for someone who thrives on technical ownership, performance optimization, and solving complex data problems in production environments.




KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Architect and build scalable APIs, microservices, and data pipelines that power the Dusk platform

 - Own the end-to-end lifecycle of backend features — from design to deployment and monitoring

 - Collaborate with frontend teams on data contracts and system integrations

 - Implement best practices around performance, reliability, and observability

 - Optimize database design, query performance, and system latency

 - Integrate with third-party systems including CRMs, ticketing, and POS solutions

 - Participate in code reviews, mentor junior developers, and help evolve engineering culture
   
   


QUALIFICATIONS

 - 5+ years of backend software engineering experience, ideally in SaaS or high-scale production systems

 - Strong proficiency in Python, Node.js, Rust or Go (we use Python, Rust, Node)

 - Experience with relational databases (PostgreSQL preferred) and data modeling

 - Familiarity with AWS, Docker, automated testing and modern CI/CD pipelines

 - Deep understanding of RESTful APIs, caching, and distributed systems design

 - Strong problem-solving skills and ability to work independently in a fast-paced environment

 - Bonus: experience with machine learning pipelines or event-driven architectures
   
   


PERKS & BENEFITS

 - Competitive salary + equity options

 - Comprehensive health, dental, and vision benefits

 - Early technical ownership in a high-growth, mission-driven company

 - Access to live events and industry networking opportunities




If you love building reliable systems that power unforgettable live experiences, and want to shape the future of entertainment infrastructure, we’d love to hear from you.

source_jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer | Frontend
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT DUSK

Dusk delivers the capabilities of a world-class entertainment director, at a fraction of the cost. Made for modern venue operators to save time, improve operations, and boost revenue. Trusted by 500+ bars, nightclubs, restaurants, and hotels – powering 50K+ concerts annually. We've raised over $5M from strategic investors, including founders and executives from Carta, Vercel, and Yelp as well as Atlantic Records, Red Light Management, and Independent Artists Group (IAG). Our team includes YC-backed founders and individuals from Goldman Sachs, BlackRock, and Apollo.io.




ABOUT THE ROLE

We're seeking a Senior Frontend Engineer to craft the user experience for thousands of venues using Dusk every day. You’ll own the interface that brings together event calendars, artist discovery, financial insights, and automation tools — making complex workflows feel effortless. This is a highly collaborative role that blends design sensibility with strong engineering execution.




KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Build performant web apps with React/React Native using TypeScript

 - Partner with design to create intuitive, accessible, and delightful interfaces

 - Define frontend patterns, state logic, and reusable UI components

 - Work with backend teams to integrate APIs and optimize data fetching

 - Ensure consistent brand and design implementation across the product suite

 - Drive improvements in UI performance, accessibility, and reliability

 - Contribute to product direction with a user-first mindset
   
   


QUALIFICATIONS

 - 5+ years of experience building modern web apps (React, Next.js, or similar)

 - Expert knowledge of JavaScript/TypeScript, HTML, and CSS

 - Strong eye for design detail and experience implementing pixel-perfect UIs

 - Knowledge of performance optimization, testing, and accessibility best practice

 - Familiarity with Figma and design-to-code collaboration workflows

 - Comfortable in fast-paced startups with ownership of large product surfaces

 - Bonus: experience with animations, design systems, or mobile optimizations
   
   


PERKS & BENEFITS

 - Competitive salary + equity options

 - Comprehensive health, dental, and vision benefits

 - Early technical ownership in a high-growth, mission-driven company

 - Access to live events and industry networking opportunities

source_jobs.title: Assistant Talent Buyer | BeatGig
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT DUSK

Dusk delivers the capabilities of a world-class entertainment director, at a fraction of the cost. Made for modern venue operators to save time, improve operations, and boost revenue. Trusted by 500+ bars, nightclubs, restaurants, and hotels – powering 50K+ concerts annually. We've raised over $5M from strategic investors, including founders and executives from Carta, Vercel, and Yelp as well as Atlantic Records, Red Light Management, and Independent Artists Group (IAG). Our team includes YC-backed founders and individuals from Goldman Sachs, BlackRock, and Apollo.io.




ABOUT BEATGIG

BeatGig (powered by Dusk), is the simplest way to book live entertainment. We're an online marketplace that connects musicians with college, corporate, and venue clients. Our marketplace spans all genres and levels of the music industry, from independent acts to major headliners represented by the largest talent agencies in the world. BeatGig is featured in publications like Forbes https://www.forbes.com/profile/beatgig/ and Yahoo Finance https://finance.yahoo.com/news/beatgig-announces-strategic-investment-led-143000815.html.




ABOUT THE ROLE

The Assistant Talent Buyer at BeatGig will play a crucial role in supporting our Talent Buyers across college, corporate, and venue segments of the business. This role is perfect for someone eager to gain hands-on experience in the live entertainment industry while contributing to the success of a fast-growing company. You’ll assist in booking top-tier artists, managing transactions, and ensuring seamless communication between artists, managers, and buyers. Your work will directly impact BeatGig’s mission to deliver the simplest way to book live entertainment. This role demands a detail-oriented, organized individual with strong communication skills and a passion for live entertainment.




KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Master the Platform: Learn BeatGig’s services and value proposition to effectively support Talent Buyers and clients.

 - Build a Pipeline: Research and develop a database of prospective clients, acquiring contact information for outreach.

 - Engage Prospects: Conduct outreach to potential clients, addressing objections to secure bookings.

 - Artist Booking: Check artist availability and assist in negotiating terms with artists, managers, and agents.

 - Contract Management: Secure signed booking contracts and ensure accuracy in all transaction details.

 - Account Completion: Assist in finalizing artist accounts and ensuring all required documentation is in place.

 - Confidentiality: Handle sensitive information with care and maintain strict confidentiality.

 - Additional Duties: Complete any other responsibilities as assigned to support Talent Buyers and the broader team




PERKS & BENEFITS

 - Competitive salary

 - Equity options

 - Comprehensive health, dental, and vision benefits

 - Work in a fast-paced startup environment

 - Access to live events and industry networking opportunities


If you're a strategic thinker with a passion for booking live entertainment, we would love to hear from you.

notes: YC-backed founders, raised $5M from strategic investors
